<?php /* * This file is part of the Predis package. * * (c) 2009-2020 Daniele Alessandri * (c) 2021-2025 Till Krüss * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ namespace Predis\Command\Argument\Search; use Predis\Command\Argument\ArrayableArgument; class CursorArguments implements ArrayableArgument { /** * @var array */ protected $arguments = []; /** * Is number of results to read. This parameter overrides COUNT specified in FT.AGGREGATE. * * @param int $readSize * @return $this */ public function count(int $readSize): self { array_push($this->arguments, 'COUNT', $readSize); return $this; } /** * {@inheritDoc} */ public function toArray(): array { return $this->arguments; } }
